name: Clinikally The Ultimate NIA (10% Niacinamide) Serum
description: A dermatologist-formulated 10% niacinamide serum for acne-prone, oily and sensitive skin. This multitasking face serum fades acne marks, dark spots and hyperpigmentation while calming redness.

name: Clinikally HydraSoft Gentle Skin Cleanser
description: Deep cleanses without stripping natural oils. Provides intense hydration for dry, sensitive skin. Soothes redness and irritation.

name: Clinikally SunProtect Sunscreen SPF 50/PA+++
description: Offers comprehensive broad-spectrum coverage against UVA/UVB rays. Non-comedogenic formula ideal for oily or acne-prone skin.

name: Clinikally Hair ReGrow Serum
description: Fights hair loss and reduces hair fall. Stimulates hair follicles for regrowth and increases hair density.

name: Clinikally Retinol Serum
description: Anti-aging serum that reduces fine lines and wrinkles while improving skin elasticity.

name: Clinikally Vitamin C Serum
description: Brightening serum that targets dull skin and hyperpigmentation, leaving a radiant glow.

name: Clinikally Azelaic Acid Cream
description: Effective treatment for rosacea and stubborn acne marks. Reduces inflammation and unclogs pores.

name: Clinikally Salicylic Acid Face Wash
description: Exfoliating face wash that deeply cleans pores, fights acne-causing bacteria, and controls sebum.

name: Clinikally Kojic Acid Cream
description: Potent skin lightening cream that tackles melasma and dark spots for an even skin tone.

name: Clinikally Hyaluronic Acid Serum
description: A deep hydration serum that plumps the skin and locks in moisture all day.
